notes:
v2.2.6 Update
🐛 Subfolder-hosted Foundry instances: Replaced root-relative GlitchSmith Library imports and default phone asset paths with route-aware URLs, fixing missing settings, default sounds, and emoji data when Foundry is served under a route prefix such as /INSTANCE/game.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.2.6
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.2.6 fixes imports and assets for subfolder-hosted Foundry instances.

  • Replaced root-relative GlitchSmith Library imports and default phone asset paths with route-aware URLs.
  • This fixes missing settings, default sounds, and emoji data when Foundry is served under a route prefix.
